title: TMX parser + tilesets + full office data migration
description: Complete TMX v2 migration: build-time parser, 12 tilesets, tile data, 5 zones, seats, interaction points, agent registry.

in: officeState.ts meeting bounds + constants.ts interaction points

dod.criterion: TMX parser generates correct TypeScript from gruai.tmx
All 12 tilesets load and render correctly
All 4 tile layers match TMX data exactly
5 zones with correct bounds, no server-room/lobby references
23 seats, 12 agents correctly mapped, TSC + Vite build pass

scope_summary: Single atomic project: TMX parser script, 12 tilesets, tile data replacement, 5-zone migration, interaction points, agent seat remapping.
sequencing_rationale: Parser first → tilesets → layout data → zones → officeState/constants → agent registry. Each task builds on the prior.

tasks.title: Build-time TMX parser script (scripts/parse-tmx.ts)
tasks.user_scenario: Developer runs npx tsx scripts/parse-tmx.ts and gets a generated TypeScript file from the TMX.
tasks.scope: Create scripts/parse-tmx.ts that reads gruai.tmx, parses XML, extracts 4 CSV tile layers, seat objects, zone objects. Output generated .ts file with exported constants.

dod.criterion: scripts/parse-tmx.ts exists and runs without error via npx tsx scripts/parse-tmx.ts
Generated output contains all 4 layer arrays each with exactly 600 elements (30x20)
Generated output contains SEAT_POSITIONS array with entries having col/row/dir from TMX pixel coords
Generated output contains ZONE_BOUNDS record with 5 zone entries with correct tile-coordinate bounds
Generated output contains TILESET_REGISTRY array with all tilesets and a WALL_GIDS set

tasks.title: Copy 7 new tileset PNGs and register all 12 tilesets in tilesetCache.ts
tasks.user_scenario: The game loads all 12 tilesets so GIDs from new TMX layers resolve to visible tiles.
tasks.scope: Copy 6 tileset PNGs from ~/Downloads/moderninteriors-win/ to public/assets/office/. Update tilesetCache.ts to load and register all 12 tilesets with correct firstgid values.

dod.criterion: 6 new PNG files exist in public/assets/office/ with correct filenames
tilesetCache.ts loads all 12 tileset images and registers each with correct firstgid
GID comment block lists all 12 tilesets with firstgid ranges
No reference to AnimBathroom tileset in the codebase

tasks.title: Replace office-layout.ts tile arrays, seats, and WALL_GIDS with TMX data
tasks.user_scenario: Office floor, furniture, and decorations render correctly using authoritative TMX data with all 23 seats.
tasks.scope: Replace FLOOR/FURNITURE_BASE/FURNITURE_TOP/DECO arrays with TMX data. Replace SEAT_POSITIONS with 23 TMX seats. Update WALL_GIDS.

dod.criterion: FURNITURE_TOP array matches TMX layer 3 exactly
DECO array matches TMX layer 4 exactly
SEAT_POSITIONS has exactly 23 entries matching TMX seat data
WALL_GIDS set covers all edge GIDs in the floor layer
npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors

tasks.title: Replace roomZones.ts with 5 TMX zones, remove server-room and lobby
tasks.user_scenario: Agent routing uses 5 TMX zones. Server-room and lobby no longer exist.
tasks.scope: Replace RoomZoneId type to 5 values. Replace ROOM_ZONES with TMX bounds. Remove infra-tool routing. Propagate to ALL consumers: types.ts, GamePage.tsx, SidePanel.tsx, constants.ts, panel files.

dod.criterion: RoomZoneId type has exactly 5 values: ceo-office, meeting, workspace, kitchen, break-room
ROOM_ZONES has 5 entries matching TMX zone bounds
Zero references to server-room or lobby in src/components/game/ (grep returns 0)
chooseDestination idle routing uses break-room, kitchen, ceo-office
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Fix meetingBounds, remap interaction points, update officeState references
tasks.user_scenario: Meeting activation uses correct TMX meeting-room bounds. Interaction points reference valid zones and walkable tiles.
tasks.scope: Update meetingBounds in officeState.ts to {minCol:23, maxCol:29, minRow:0, maxRow:11}. Remove server-room interaction points. Remap lobby points to break-room. Add kitchen interaction point.

dod.criterion: meetingBounds is { minCol: 23, maxCol: 29, minRow: 0, maxRow: 11 }
No interaction points reference server-room or lobby zones
At least one interaction point exists in kitchen zone
Former lobby points remapped to break-room with valid coordinates
npx tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Remap agent-registry.json seatIds and positions to 23 TMX seats
tasks.user_scenario: All 12 agents spawn at correct TMX seat positions with logical zone placement.
tasks.scope: Update seatId and position for all 12 agents. CEO=seat-1, Devon=seat-2, workspace seats for engineers, meeting seat for Morgan.

dod.criterion: All 12 agents have valid seatId values from seat-1 through seat-23 with no duplicates
Each agent's game.position matches their seat's TMX coordinates
CEO at seat-1 (col 2, row 3), Devon at seat-2 (col 2, row 7)
JSON is valid and parseable
